name: Portgas.D.Ace - OP07-119 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, this Character gains [Rush] during this turn. (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
